commitSeed.description: Commit a hashed seed for later verification.

commitment.description: BLAKE2b hash of the player's secret seed.

shuffleDeck.description: Encrypt all cards with shuffle key and permute.

lockDeck.description: Remove shuffle encryption and apply per-position lock keys.

revealLockKey.description: Reveal a per-position lock scalar to deal a card face-up.

deckPosition.description: Which card position in the deck is being revealed.

scalar.description: Ristretto255 lock decryption scalar for this position.

wager.description: Post the round wager (escrowed from chips immediately).

amount.description: Chips wagered. At least min(minBet, chips), at most the player's chips.

insurance.description: Take or decline insurance against a banker blackjack (offered when the banker upcard is an ace). Costs floor(wager/2); pays 2:1.

take.description: True to take insurance, false to decline.

decision.description: A playing decision for the hand currently in turn.

move.description: The move for the current hand.

verifySeed.description: Reveal the secret seed for full game replay and verification.

seed.description: The secret seed. BLAKE2b hash must match the earlier commitment.
